scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.verify:api: cd apps/api && uv run --cache-dir ../../.uv-cache ruff check app tests && uv run --cache-dir ../../.uv-cache python -m compileall app tests && uv run --cache-dir ../../.uv-cache pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider --basetemp ../../.pytest-tmp-api
scripts.verify: npm run verify:web && npm run verify:api
